items.name: Round button
items.css: .SKIN { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; } .SKIN .b { width:70%; aspect-ratio:1; max-height:70%; border-radius:50%; background:#222a3a; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:30px; transition:.25s; } .SKIN:active .b { transform:scale(.93); } .SKIN.on .b { background:var(--accent); box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--accent); } .SKIN .at-name { font-size:12px; color:#8b98b8; }
